ands include Expedia, Hotels.com, Orbitz and Hotwire. The company also owns Vrbo, the second largest “alternative accommodations” brand, next to Airbnb (“ABNB”). We believe alternative accommodations will continue to gain popularity and take mark et share away from more traditional leisure

focused on concentrating the portfolio into our highest conviction names and most differentiated insights. We added three new core positions: Lyft, Airbnb, and Pinterest. We also meaningfully added to our position in Floor & Decor. We completely exited our position in Electronic Arts and trimmed
